zh.lifeSummary: 當Percival Amias於1425年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾設維特時，他的父親John Amias Sir, Amias of Chevet34歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne Southill35歲。他和Agnes de Lacy至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1492年12月25日在英國英格蘭越可爾桑達爾 馬尼亞享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Amias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from the French city of Amiens (Somme), which is recorded as Samarobriva Ambianorum in classical sources. Samarobriva is a Celtic place-name meaning ‘the bridge over the river Somme’, while the affix Ambianorum means ‘of the Ambiani’. Ambiāni is an ethnic name deriving from Celtic ambi(o)- ‘around’, probably meaning ‘those on both sides (of the Somme)’ or possibly ‘the people of the world’. The affix has replaced the place-name which it once qualified, and it is the ablative form Ambiānis of this ethnic name which is the source of the current place-name Amiens. For the development of the surname in England, compare ‘merchants of Amias’, 1326 in London Letter Books E (London).

variants.name: Ames
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Amis or from the feminine form, Amice. The Old French word amis, is from Latin amicus ‘friend’, which was used in Late Latin as a term for a man of the lower classes, in particular a slave. There were also derivatives of this as personal names, in particular masculine Amicius and feminine Amicia. Both were in use as personal names in England and may have contributed to the surname.
German: perhaps a nickname for an active person, from an ancient Germanic word related to Old High German amazzig ‘busy’.
Dutch: possibly a patronymic from Ame a common personal name in Holland and Friesland, an abbreviated form of an ancient Germanic personal name, perhaps beginning with amel ‘strong’.

variants.name: London Letter Books
meanings: English: (i) occupational name, nickname from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French bourdour, bordere ‘jester, joker, buffoon’. (ii) status name from Middle English border(e) ‘bordar, cottager’ (Old French bordier, Latin bordarius), a feudal tenant of the lowest rank. (iii) occupational name perhaps, as Reaney suggests, from an unrecorded Middle English * border ‘maker of boards or tables’. Compare Robert Bordmakere, 1356 in London Letter Books G; William le Bordhewere, 1327 in Fransson ; Richard Bordwreghte, 1332 in Subsidy Rolls (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Percival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French versions of the Arthurian legend, where the name is spelled Perceval. According to Chrétien de Troyes (12th century) and Wolfram von Eschenbach ( c.1170–1220 ), Perceval (German Parzifal) was the perfectly pure and innocent knight who alone could succeed in the quest for the Holy Grail (a cup or bowl with supernatural powers, which in medieval legend was identified with the chalice that had received Christ's blood at the Crucifixion). Later versions of the Grail legend assign this role to Sir Galahad . The name Perceval probably represents a drastic remodelling of the Celtic name Peredur, as if from Old French perce(r) ‘pierce’ + val ‘valley’. This may well have been influenced by Percy , which was similarly analysed as a compound of perce(r) ‘pierce’ + haie ‘hedge’.

en.lifeSummary: When Percival Amias was born in 1425, in Chevet, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Amias Sir, Amias of Chevet, was 34 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne Southill, was 35. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes de Lacy. He died on 25 December 1492, in Sandal Magna, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes de Lacy. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1492, à Sandal Magna, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ko.Mary Scots Hinton St. George, Somerset,: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Percival Amias(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 처베트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Amias Sir, Amias of Chevet(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne Southill(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Agnes de Lacy(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 샌다 매그나에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.
